response.justification: Wei Chen is a capable generalist engineer with a long track record across web, mobile, and systems programming, but the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing infrastructure, feature flagging, telemetry pipelines, or growth engineering — which are the core competencies for this role. The seniority level (Senior/Staff) falls short of the Principal IC6 bar, and there is no evidence of cross-team technical leadership at the scale or domain specificity required. High-throughput microservices experience at Sociomantic is a partial signal, but it does not substitute for experimentation system design and statistical measurement expertise.
strengths: High-throughput distributed systems experience handling millions of HTTP requests/second at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Broad multi-language proficiency including C/C++, TypeScript/JavaScript, Java, and C# covering the required language set
Demonstrated software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and a history of open-source platform building
concerns: Zero visible experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging, or rollout-risk management
No mention of telemetry infrastructure, metrics systems, statistical analysis, or growth engineering of any kind
Seniority gap: career profile maps to Senior/Staff IC, not Principal IC6; no evidence of org-wide technical leadership or multi-team influence

key_factors.factor: No experimentation or growth platform experience
